text:
is a serialized publication based on Neon Genesis Evangelion and other related series. It was published by Sony Magazines in its original publication and later edition by DeAgostini with contents of the first and second Rebuild of Evangelion film series. It was serialized with 30 issues in the original publication by Sony Magazines and 50 issues by the second edition by DeAgostini.

Overview

Sony Magazines

On 15 July 2006, Sony Magazines launched the bi-monthly Evangelion Chronicle to mark the tenth anniversary of the Evangelion franchise. Inside, a lot of information provided by Gainax informs the reader about various elements of the Neon Genesis Evangelion series. The data is provided in classified cards and can be detached and perforated to be stored in binders. Official binders were sold separately for 1,600 yen. The magazine finished its publication on 15 September 2007 with the thirty issue. 

Later the encyclopedia is published in two volumes by We've Inc. editions under the titles THE ESSENTIAL EVANGELION CHRONICLE SIDE A and THE ESSENTIAL EVANGELION CHRONICLE SIDE B

There are three binders for storing Evangelion Chronicles cards:

File No. 00
Mechanic Sheets - The Evangelions, the Angels and more generally the "mechanical" elements.
Character Sheets - Characters from the TV series.

File No. 01
Timeline Sheets - The episodes of the television series.
Tactics Sheets - Major Events, Tactical Operations and Technical Operations.
Installation Sheets - Places and Organizations.
Technology Sheets - The technological elements.

File No. 02
Extra Sheets

DeAgostini

On 19 January 2010, the DeAgostini Japan publishing house reissued the magazine in weekly format with revised and corrected information. On 26 August 2010, ten new, never-before-seen issues of the magazine were announced in conjunction with the release of the film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance. They provide additional information related to content from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series as well as the spin-off Petit Eva: Evangelion@School. New categories for sorting records were also created.

File No. EX
Character Sheets (Rebuild) - The characters from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series .
Mechanic Sheets (Rebuild) - The Evangelions, the Angels and more generally the "mechanical" elements.
Story Sheets (Rebuild) - The story of the films Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone and Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance.
Petit Eva: Evangelion@School Sheets - Characters from the Petit Eva spin-off series.
Extra Sheets

The magazine is extended with more ten issues named Evangelion Chronicle - StoryFile which include summaries of episodes already published in previous issues. A fifth binder named No. SP is also available.

In December 2011, the Evangelion Chronicle: Illustrations book was published collecting the illustrations published in the magazine. Two covers are available for this book depicting Rei Ayanami or Asuka Langley Sōryu.
